style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a large block labelled THE PROPOSAL. Two channels lead rightward to a simple person token labelled DECISION-MAKER. The upper channel is a very thin pipe labelled BRIEFING NOTE, with a small tag ABOUT 40 BITS/S. The lower channel is a wide pipe labelled SIMULATION · VISUALIZATION · INTERACTION, drawn carrying many fine lines at once. A small caption reads WIDEN THE CHANNEL, NOT SIMPLIFY THE TRUTH. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond a simple token.
composed_prompt:
